# W9 Helper

> Free W-9 form generator for freelancers and independent contractors. No account required. Takes 3 minutes.

W9 Helper (w9helper.com) is a free online tool that guides freelancers and independent contractors through IRS Form W-9. Users complete a 6-step form and download a filled PDF directly in their browser. All sensitive data (SSN/EIN) is processed client-side and never transmitted to any server.

W9 Helper is operated by 1-800Accountant, a national tax and accounting firm serving small businesses and self-employed individuals.

## Main pages

- [Homepage](https://w9helper.com/): Overview, W-9 form entry tool, and tax estimator
- [W-9 Form](https://w9helper.com/form): The interactive 6-step W-9 generator

## Guides

- [What is a W-9?](https://w9helper.com/guides/what-is-a-w9): Explanation of IRS Form W-9 and who needs one
- [How to fill out a W-9](https://w9helper.com/guides/how-to-fill-out-w9): Field-by-field walkthrough
- [W-9 vs. W-4](https://w9helper.com/guides/w9-vs-w4): Differences between contractor and employee tax forms
- [W-9 for LLCs](https://w9helper.com/guides/w9-for-llcs): Tax classification guidance for single-member and multi-member LLCs
- [After submitting a W-9](https://w9helper.com/guides/after-submitting-w9): What to expect after giving a W-9 to a payer
